Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(MAP(ARRAY['FullServiceRestaurant', 'QuickServiceRestaurant', 'RetailStandalone', 'RetailStripmall', 'PrimarySchool', 'SecondarySchool', 'SmallOffice', 'MediumOffice', 'LargeOffice', 'SmallHotel', 'LargeHotel', 'Hospital', 'Outpatient', 'Warehouse'], ARRAY[1.0, 0.8, 0.6, 0.5, 0.7, 0.7, 0.4, 0.6, 0.9, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0, 0.7, 0.3])[bs."in.comstock_building_type"] * bs.weight) AS bldg_load_factor 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/dbad416b2338016da4687997e98b1143509b6a531203a2b581ca547d1cb5e0c6/32591f7d-1d79-47b7-9364-760e046d46a9/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
